news.title: Rockwool (CPSE:ROCK B) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher After Analyst Target Revisions
news.summary: Rockwool’s modeled fair value has shifted from DKK 228.96 to DKK 231.40, keeping the focus squarely around the low DKK 200s range that many analysts are using as an anchor. That aligns with recent Street commentary, where both bullish and more cautious views cluster around similar levels while weighing earnings assumptions against execution risks. Rockwool AS (RKWBF) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Growth Amidst Market Challenges
news.summary: Rockwool AS (RKWBF) reports a 2% revenue growth and strategic expansions, while addressing margin pressures and cost inflation.

news.title: Assessing Rockwool (CPSE:ROCK B) Valuation After 2026 Outlook Upgrade And Higher Investment Plans
news.summary: Rockwool (CPSE:ROCK B) raised its 2026 revenue growth outlook to 3% to 6% and plans higher investments, after reporting improving volume demand since March and maintaining an EBIT margin target of 13% to 14%.
